batch_summary: Deed [332] added to Phase 5 — Oil, Gas and Mineral Lease from BOTH Trust No. 1 AND Trust No. 2 (M. Stephen Beard, Sole Trustee) to XTO Energy Inc., effective 10/16/2006, covering 491.99 acres across 9 tracts in Freestone County (Strickland A-550, B. Slaughter A-565, W. Curry A-9). Identical Exhibit A to deeds [14]/[36], [322], and [21]/[40]. Paid-up lease, 3-year primary term, 3/16 royalty, cost-free royalty, vertical + horizontal Pugh clauses, hard mineral exclusion. Two FC index errors corrected: (1) index listed only Trust No. 2 — both trusts are lessors; (2) index listed 'W Ritchie SUR' — lease covers Strickland/Slaughter/Curry surveys. Name variant noted: 'N. Lansford' (this instrument) vs 'N. Lunsford' (deed [322]) for same Vol.2 p.406 source; grantee identified as 'Jessie M. Bounds' (vs 'J.M. Bounds' in [322]). No 'S. Slaughter' error (cf. ISSUE-27). ISSUE-43 item 18 marked PULLED. Current lease status unknown (primary term expired ~Oct 2009).

operations.description: Add deed [332] entry to Phase 5 section, after deed [17] and before the Phase 5B cross-reference note
operations.content: 5. `2006-10-16_[332]_f` — Trust No. 1 AND Trust No. 2 (M. Stephen Beard, Sole Trustee) → XTO Energy Inc. (oil, gas and mineral lease, Freestone) — **491.99 acres** across 9 tracts: Tract One 200.0 ac J. Strickland A-550 (source: C.C. Ballard et ux→J.M. Bounds 11/7/1908 Vol.31 p.182 FC); Tract Two 53.33 ac B. Slaughter A-565 (source: Mrs. Martha Cameron→J.M. Bounds 12/15/1912 Vol.47 p.118 FC); Tract Three 53.0 ac B. Slaughter A-565 (source: S.T. Bounds et ux→J.M. Bounds 5/18/1883 Vol.37 p.463 FC); Tract Four 53.33 ac B. Slaughter A-565 (source: N. Lansford et ux Savanah Lansford→Jessie M. Bounds 8/20/1890 Vol.2 p.406 FC); Tract Five 4.5 ac B. Slaughter A-565 (source: S.T. Bounds et ux→J.M. Bounds 5/18/1883 Vol.37 p.463 FC); Tract Six 40.0 ac B. Slaughter A-565 (source: I.M. Thompson et ux→J.M. Bounds 9/21/1885 Vol.2 p.410 FC); Tract Seven 13.33 ac B. Slaughter A-565 (source: I.M. Thompson et ux→J.M. Bounds 3/13/1886 Vol.2 p.408 FC); Tract Eight 50.5 ac W. Curry A-9 (source: S.T. Bounds et ux→J.M. Bounds 5/18/1883 Vol.37 p.463 FC); Tract Nine 24.0 ac W. Curry A-9 (source: N. Lansford et ux Savanah Lansford→Jessie M. Bounds 8/20/1890 Vol.2 p.406 FC). **Identical Exhibit A to deeds [14]/[36], [322], and [21]/[40].** Consideration: $10.00 + OGVC. Paid-up lease (no delay rentals). Primary term: 3 years. Royalty: 3/16 oil and gas. Cost-free royalty (no post-production deductions except severance/ad valorem/windfall profits taxes). Shut-in royalty: $1.00/acre after 90 consecutive days. Pooling: 80 ac oil / 640 ac gas + 10% tolerance (horizontal completions treated as gas wells for pooling). **Vertical Pugh clause**: rights terminate below 100 ft below deepest formation drilled after primary term. **Horizontal Pugh clause**: unpooled acreage released at end of primary term or cessation of continuous operations. **Hard mineral exclusion**: coal, lignite, uranium, fissionable materials, gravel, and all hard minerals excluded. **Indemnification**: lessee indemnifies lessor. **Damage cleanup**: lessee must obtain consent for drillsite location; restore surface after operations. **Water wells**: lessee may drill but must leave casing for lessor on abandonment. Lessor address: 5408 Point Wood Circle, Waco TX 76710. XTO address: 810 Houston St, Fort Worth TX 76102. Acknowledged Nov 10, 2006 McLennan County before Kari S. Buzbee NP (exp. 6/17/2009). ⚠️ Acknowledgment date correction: "October" struck through, "November" written — acknowledged 11/10/2006 (25 days after effective date). Second acknowledgment block blank (Beard signed for both trusts as single party). Filed Dec 19, 2006 1:45 PM; Mary Lynn White, County Clerk, Freestone County; Deputy: Linda Jarvis; Fee: $28.00; Receipt 73591. Doc# 06008751; OR Vol. 1385, Pg. 505–508 (4 pages). ⚠️ **FC INDEX ERRORS**: (1) Index grantor "BEARD M STEPHEN TRUSTEE" — FC index context (F-Beard search) placed this under Trust No. 2 instruments; actual lessors are BOTH Trust No. 1 AND Trust No. 2; (2) Index survey "W RITCHIE SUR" is wrong — Exhibit A describes land in Strickland A-550, B. Slaughter A-565, and W. Curry A-9 (no Richie League land in lease description; the 491.99-ac block includes the 162.99-ac Richie League portion by geographic overlap but the legal description references only Strickland/Slaughter/Curry source deeds). ⚠️ **Name variants from source deed citations**: (a) "N. Lansford and wife, Savanah Lansford" (Tracts Four/Nine) — deed [322] cites the same Vol.2 p.406 source deed as "N. Lunsford"; "Lansford" vs "Lunsford" is a name variant between the two lease instruments. (b) Grantee identified as "Jessie M. Bounds" (Tracts Four/Nine) — deed [322] uses "J.M. Bounds" for the same person; "Jessie" may be the full first name used in the 1890 source deed (upstream pull will clarify). ⚠️ **No "S. Slaughter" error**: Unlike deed [322] which used "S. Slaughter Survey A-565" once for Sixth Tract (ISSUE-27), the XTO lease correctly identifies "B. Slaughter Survey, A-565" in all six Slaughter Survey references — confirms ISSUE-27 as a [322]-specific scrivener's error, not a chain-wide confusion. **Executive rights context**: Trust No. 1 holds executive rights over the [14] Tract One parcels (329 ac net) per deed [17]/[38]; Trust No. 2 holds executive rights over the 162.99-ac Richie League portion per deed [20]/[39] reservation; Beard as Sole Trustee of both trusts exercised both sets of executive rights in this single lease. **Current lease status unknown**: primary term expired ~Oct 2009; lease may be held by production (HBP) or have expired; determination requires Texas Railroad Commission production records or operator confirmation. ISSUE-43 item 18. Phase 5

04_MINERAL_RIGHTS_TRACKER.md.timestamp_summary: Deed [332] — XTO Energy OGL terms documented; Trust No. 2 XTO lease note corrected (both trusts, not just Trust No. 2); lease history added to [14]/[36] section; name variants noted (Lansford/Lunsford, Jessie M./J.M. Bounds)

operations.description: Add XTO lease documentation to [14]/[36] mineral analysis section, after the coal/lignite exclusion note and before the upstream source deeds note
operations.anchor: However, it establishes that coal/lignite was a separately contemplated mineral interest as of 1979.
operations.content: - **XTO Energy lease [deed [332], 10/16/2006]**: Trust No. 1 (executive rights holder per [17]) and Trust No. 2 (50% non-executive mineral holder in [14] tracts; executive rights holder over [16] tracts per [20]) jointly leased the entire 491.99-ac Exhibit A block to XTO Energy Inc. Beard signed as Sole Trustee of both trusts. Terms: paid-up lease, 3-year primary term, **3/16 royalty** (vs. 1/8 in [322] McComb lease — 87.5% increase in royalty rate), cost-free royalty (no post-production deductions except taxes), vertical Pugh (100 ft below deepest formation), horizontal Pugh (unpooled acreage released), hard mineral exclusion (coal, lignite, uranium, gravel). Pooling: 80 ac oil / 640 ac gas + 10% tolerance. **Current status unknown** — primary term expired ~Oct 2009; lease may be HBP or expired. ⚠️ XTO lease hard mineral exclusion is similar to but broader than [322]'s coal/lignite exclusion — adds uranium, fissionable materials, gravel, and all hard minerals. ⚠️ FC index errors: indexed as Trust No. 2 only and "W Ritchie SUR" — both incorrect (see deed [332] entry in 03). ⚠️ **Name variant**: source deed Vol.2 p.406 cited as "N. Lansford→Jessie M. Bounds" in this instrument vs "N. Lunsford→J.M. Bounds" in [322] — upstream pull needed to determine correct names.

Slaughter A-565, and W. Curry A-9 (NOT W. Ritchie). The lease covers the entire 491.99-ac Exhibit A block (identical to [14]/[36], [322], [21]/[40]) — this includes the 162.99-ac portion that falls within the W. Ritchie survey by geographic overlap, which is why the FC index associated it with W. Ritchie. Terms: paid-up lease; 3-year primary term (expired ~Oct 2009); 3/16 royalty; cost-free royalty; vertical Pugh (100 ft below deepest formation); horizontal Pugh (unpooled acreage released); hard mineral exclusion (coal, lignite, uranium, gravel). **Current status unknown** — primary term expired ~Oct 2009; may be HBP or expired; requires production records or operator confirmation. [PDF CONFIRMED: deed [332], 2026-04-01]

Fee: $28.00; Receipt: 73591. | 505–508 (4 pages) | 2006-10-16 (effective) | 2006-12-19 | **Oil, Gas and Mineral Lease** — 491.99 ac across 9 tracts: J. Strickland A-550 (200.0 ac), B. Slaughter A-565 (217.49 ac across 5 tracts), W. Curry A-9 (74.5 ac across 2 tracts). Identical to Exhibit A of deeds [14]/[36], [322], and [21]/[40]. Lessors: BOTH Trust No. 1 AND Trust No. 2 (M. Stephen Beard, Sole Trustee of both; address: 5408 Point Wood Circle, Waco TX 76710). Lessee: XTO Energy Inc. (810 Houston St, Fort Worth TX 76102). Consideration: $10.00 + OGVC. Paid-up lease (no delay rentals). Primary term: 3 years (expired ~Oct 2009). Royalty: 3/16 oil and gas; cost-free (no post-production deductions except taxes). Shut-in: $1.00/acre after 90 consecutive days. Pooling: 80 ac oil / 640 ac gas + 10%. Vertical Pugh (100 ft below deepest formation); horizontal Pugh (unpooled acreage released). Hard mineral exclusion (coal, lignite, uranium, fissionable materials, gravel, hard minerals excluded). Indemnification + damage cleanup + water wells clauses. Acknowledged Nov 10, 2006 McLennan County (Kari S. Buzbee NP, exp. 6/17/09; ⚠️ "October" struck through, "November" written). Second ack. block blank. ⚠️ FC index errors: (1) grantor indexed as "BEARD M STEPHEN TRUSTEE" suggesting Trust No. 2 only — actual lessors are BOTH trusts; (2) survey indexed as "W RITCHIE SUR" — Exhibit A is Strickland A-550/B. Slaughter A-565/W. Curry A-9, not W. Ritchie. ⚠️ Name variants: "N. Lansford" + "Jessie M. Bounds" (this instrument) vs "N. Lunsford" + "J.M. Bounds" (deed [322]) for same Vol.2 p.406 source deed. ⚠️ No "S. Slaughter" error (cf. ISSUE-27 re deed [322]). **Executive rights**: Trust 1 exercised executive rights over [14] tracts per [17]/[38]; Trust 2 exercised executive rights over [16] tracts per [20]/[39]; Beard as sole trustee of both executed the single lease.
